title: Container
overview: Use Container when content needs a readable max width while the page background remains full width.

classes.name: axo-page
classes.description: Page wrapper with safe min-height and base spacing.

classes.name: axo-container
classes.description: Constrains content width with responsive side padding.

classes.name: axo-section
classes.description: Adds vertical section spacing for major page blocks.

options.name: --axo-container-width
options.description: Controls the maximum readable content width.

options.name: --axo-section-gap
options.description: Controls vertical spacing between section content.

example: Container keeps long text from stretching too wide.
preview: This block uses Axoloth container and card utilities.

title: Row
overview: Use Row and Cluster for horizontal groups that should wrap safely when the viewport is narrow.

classes.name: axo-row
classes.description: Horizontal layout for direct children with a shared gap.

classes.name: axo-cluster
classes.description: Wrapping inline group for nav links, tags, and action rows.

options.name: --axo-control-gap
options.description: Controls gap for semantic controls and grouped actions.

title: Stack
overview: Use Stack when children should flow vertically with consistent spacing without writing margins on every element.

classes.name: axo-stack
classes.description: Vertical flow utility for repeated blocks.

classes.name: axo-section
classes.description: Larger vertical spacing for page sections.

classes.name: axo-form
classes.description: Form-specific vertical stack with control spacing.

options.name: --axo-stack-gap
options.description: Controls the direct child gap inside a stack.

preview: Spacing is applied by the parent utility.

title: Sidebar
overview: Use Sidebar for app navigation, rail layouts, hover-expand menus, and fixed left or right panels.
template: <aside class="axo-sidebar axo-sidebar-fixed axo-sidebar-fixed-left axo-sidebar-rail axo-sidebar-hover axo-surface">

classes.name: axo-shell
classes.description: Flow layout wrapper for sidebar and main content.

classes.name: axo-sidebar
classes.description: Base sidebar container.

classes.name: axo-sidebar-left
classes.description: Places a flow sidebar on the left side.

classes.name: axo-sidebar-right
classes.description: Places a flow sidebar on the right side.

classes.name: axo-sidebar-rail
classes.description: Compresses sidebar to rail width.

classes.name: axo-sidebar-hover
classes.description: Expands rail sidebar on hover or keyboard focus.

classes.name: axo-sidebar-fixed
classes.description: Pins sidebar to the viewport.

classes.name: axo-sidebar-main-offset-left
classes.description: Offsets main content by expanded sidebar width.

classes.name: axo-sidebar-main-offset-rail-left
classes.description: Offsets main content by rail width.

classes.name: axo-sidebar-item
classes.description: Menu item alignment and interaction structure.

title: Navbar
overview: Use Navbar utilities for page headers with brand, search, navigation links, and action areas.

classes.name: axo-header
classes.description: Base page header structure.

classes.name: axo-header-grid
classes.description: Grid header with left, center, nav, and right slots.

classes.name: axo-header-left
classes.description: Left header slot.

classes.name: axo-header-center
classes.description: Center header slot for search or primary controls.

classes.name: axo-header-nav
classes.description: Navigation slot inside header.

classes.name: axo-header-right
classes.description: Right action slot.

classes.name: axo-nav
classes.description: Navigation container structure.

classes.name: axo-nav-list
classes.description: Resets list style and lays nav items horizontally.

preview:
• Docs

title: Card
overview: Use Card as a neutral content surface for repeated items, panels, settings blocks, and previews.
template: Content stays project-styled, while structure is handled by Axoloth.

classes.name: axo-card
classes.description: Neutral card shell with radius, border, padding, and transition.

classes.name: axo-surface
classes.description: Adaptive neutral surface for card backgrounds.

classes.name: axo-contrast
classes.description: High contrast card surface.

classes.name: axo-lift
classes.description: Hover lift effect.

classes.name: axo-glow
classes.description: Subtle glow animation utility.

example: Use custom CSS or Tailwind for colors if needed.
preview:

Neutral card.

Contrast

title: Bento
overview: Use Bento for responsive card grids where selected items can span wider or taller than normal cards.

classes.name: axo-bento
classes.description: Responsive bento grid wrapper.

classes.name: axo-square
classes.description: Square card span.

classes.name: axo-wide
classes.description: Two-column card span when room exists.

classes.name: axo-tall
classes.description: Two-row card span when room exists.

classes.name: axo-large
classes.description: Two-column and two-row card span.

classes.name: axo-stack
classes.description: Vertical content rhythm inside bento cards.

title: Spacing
overview: Use spacing utilities and CSS variables to keep page rhythm consistent without creating a full spacing framework.
template: Override variables locally when a section needs a different rhythm.

classes.name: axo-page
classes.description: Applies safe page padding and min height.

classes.name: axo-section
classes.description: Applies section-level vertical rhythm.

classes.name: axo-stack
classes.description: Controls vertical child spacing.

classes.name: axo-cluster
classes.description: Controls wrapping inline spacing.

title: Alignment
overview: Use alignment utilities for common placement patterns such as rows, clusters, centered content, and adaptive groups.

classes.name: axo-row
classes.description: Single-line horizontal alignment with gap.

classes.name: axo-cluster
classes.description: Wrapping horizontal alignment for nav and actions.

classes.name: axo-center
classes.description: Centers content within available space.

classes.name: axo-switcher
classes.description: Switches between horizontal and stacked layout based on available width.

title: Responsive
overview: Use responsive utilities for layout patterns that should adapt without hand-writing breakpoints for every page.

classes.name: axo-auto-grid
classes.description: Creates a responsive grid with minimum card width.

classes.name: axo-switcher
classes.description: Switches child layout based on available width.

classes.name: axo-reel
classes.description: Horizontal overflow row for compact screens.

classes.name: axo-hide-mobile
classes.description: Hides content on small screens.

classes.name: axo-show-mobile
classes.description: Shows content only on small screens.

options.name: --axo-row-min
options.description: Minimum row height for bento layouts.

preview: <article class="axo-card axo-wide axo-surface">Wide when there is room</article>

title: Motion
overview: Use Motion utilities for simple CSS animation presets that can be combined with any layout or visual style.
template: Enter with rise, lift on hover, glow over time.

classes.name: axo-fade
classes.description: Fade-in animation.

classes.name: axo-rise
classes.description: Fade and rise entrance animation.

classes.name: axo-pop
classes.description: Scale-up entrance animation.

classes.name: axo-lift
classes.description: Hover lift interaction.

classes.name: axo-glow
classes.description: Animated glow shadow.

classes.name: axo-shimmer
classes.description: Animated shimmer overlay.

preview: <article class="docs-preview-panel axo-card axo-surface axo-rise axo-lift">Rise + lift</article>
